sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; import styles from './DriverCard.module.css'; export default function DriverCard({ driver, onCancel }) { const stars = '★'.repeat(Math.round(driver.rating)) + '☆'.repeat(5 - Math.round(driver.rating)); return (
Driver on the way 2 min away
{driver.initials}
{driver.name}
{driver.vehicle} · {driver.model}
{driver.trips.toLocaleString()} Trips completed
{driver.rating} {stars.slice(0,5)}
Call Driver
); }
